title: Rotp-GoldExperienceRequiem
description: A Minecraft addon project that adds Gold Experience Requiem inspired abilities to the Ripples of the Past mod.
body:
Gold Experience Requiem Addon is an addon for Ripples of the Past that adds Gold Experience Requiem as a playable Stand.

This addon focuses on recreating Gold Experience Requiem with custom abilities, visual effects, sounds, and gameplay interactions. It is designed for players who want a more complete Giorno-inspired Stand experience in Minecraft.

Features:
- Adds Gold Experience Requiem as a new Stand
- Custom Stand model, texture, animations, and sounds
- Return to Zero ability with rewind-style effects
- Special visual effects for time erase interactions
- Custom cosmic sky and screen distortion effects
- Stand disc and related assets
- Integration with Ripples of the Past gameplay systems

This project is mainly intended for fans of JoJo's Bizarre Adventure and Ripples of the Past who want to use Gold Experience Requiem in survival, multiplayer, or modpack gameplay.

Requirements:
- Minecraft Forge 1.16.5
- Ripples of the Past
